name: dev.smartergpt/axf
title: AXF
description: Agent eXoskeleton Framework control plane for workspace-native agent capabilities over MCP.

environmentVariables.name: AXF_PROJECT_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Canonical AXF project root for manifest and adapter discovery. Defaults to current working directory when no marker is found.

environmentVariables.name: AXF_EXECUTION_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Canonical AXF execution root for runtime cwd and caller-facing execution. Defaults to current working directory.

environmentVariables.name: AXF_WORKSPACE
environmentVariables.description: Legacy alias that sets both the AXF project root and execution root.
